title: papaver oreophilum
intro: Papaver oreophilum, also known as the Alpine Poppy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and its flowers come in shades of pink and white. Papaver oreophilum has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
